$comment: Claim -> test map enforced by scripts/check-claims.mjs (AGENTS.md rule 2). Each anchor must appear verbatim in its source file, and every listed test title must exist in tests/*.test.js. Every test titled 'PROMISE: ...' must be registered here. When you add a behavioral claim to README.md, docs/, AGENTS.md, or CHANGELOG.md, register it; when you soften or remove a claim, update or remove its entry.

claims.anchor: The scheduler starts ready tasks in deterministic graph order and runs independent tasks in parallel up to the configured concurrency.
tests: runJob schedules ready tasks in parallel up to concurrency
orders tasks deterministically with dependencies before dependents

claims.anchor: `--force` re-runs tasks while still recording fresh cache entries
tests: force re-runs cached tasks and refreshes the cache entry

claims.anchor: `--dry-run` prints the plan with predicted cache hits without executing
tests: planJob predicts cache hits without executing tasks

claims.anchor: `cache clear` resets the task cache, and `gc` prunes old run records and cache entries unused for `--cache-days` days
tests: cache clear and gc maintain local pipeline state

claims.anchor: `gc` prunes run records and cache entries unused for `--cache-days` days
tests: cache clear and gc maintain local pipeline state
cache hits refresh mtimes and gc prunes cold cache entries

claims.anchor: `gc` keeps the newest run records and prunes task-cache entries unused for `--cache-days` days.
tests: cache clear and gc maintain local pipeline state

claims.anchor: Cache hits refresh their last-used time, and `--cache-days 0` disables cache pruning.
tests: cache hits refresh mtimes and gc prunes cold cache entries

claims.anchor: Runs also auto-prune to the newest 50 records; set `ASYNC_PIPELINE_KEEP_RUNS` to change the limit or `0` to disable.
tests: run auto-prunes records, emits json, and finds config from subdirectories

claims.anchor: Task output buffers cap at 8 MiB per stream (`ASYNC_PIPELINE_MAX_LOG_BYTES`, `0` = unlimited); stored logs keep the tail.
tests: task logs are capped by ASYNC_PIPELINE_MAX_LOG_BYTES with a truncation marker

claims.anchor: The CLI finds `pipeline.ts` from any subdirectory by walking up.
tests: run auto-prunes records, emits json, and finds config from subdirectories

claims.anchor: Make cache behavior explicit through declared task inputs, cache refs, and task config.
tests: PROMISE: per-task inputs isolate cache invalidation
glob inputs are resolved deterministically and included in cache keys
rejects unknown cache stores and policies

claims.anchor: Read pipeline metadata without cloning sources, running `prepare`, executing tasks, or evaluating deferred shell callbacks.
tests: CLI exposes metadata, matrix, source list, source sync, and namespaced run-task
normalizes sources and allows declared external task refs as metadata

claims.anchor: Generate and check a pinned GitHub Actions workflow from `pipeline.ts`.
tests: github generate writes a current workflow and lock
renders github workflow triggers and bootloader steps

claims.anchor: The checked-in workflow targets Node `>= 24` on GitHub-hosted Linux (`ubuntu-latest`) and macOS (`macos-latest`) runners
tests: renders github job runner labels and runner matrices

claims.anchor: Use `job({ github: { runsOn } })` to select a hosted runner or self-hosted label set, and `job({ github: { runsOnMatrix } })` to fan a job out across multiple runner label sets
tests: renders github job runner labels and runner matrices
github runner config rejects invalid and conflicting settings

claims.anchor: If a generated command exists but is not claimed by the lock, it fails with `ASYNC_PIPELINE_SYNC_CONFLICT`.
tests: resolves package-name targets and rejects unmanaged conflicts
detects stale synced task manifests and locks

claims.anchor: generation fails with `ASYNC_PIPELINE_SYNC_CONFLICT` instead of overwriting your work
tests: resolves package-name targets and rejects unmanaged conflicts

claims.anchor: a hand-edited workflow or script fails CI with a diffable reason
tests: detects stale synced task manifests and locks
sync CLI generates and checks configured targets
github generate writes a current workflow and lock

claims.anchor: `prepare` runs inside that source checkout before source tasks run.
tests: runs a path source task with root-owned dynamic prepare and cache reuse

claims.anchor: Run many-repo impact checks with explicit dependent repos and namespaced task refs such as `storefront:test`.
tests: composes source pipeline tasks into a namespaced graph

claims.anchor: Unknown fields in the pipeline, tasks, taskDefaults, jobs, or a job's `github` config are rejected with `ASYNC_PIPELINE_UNKNOWN_FIELD`
tests: rejects unknown config fields with the field name

claims.anchor: On `workflow_dispatch` only jobs with a `manual` trigger run implicitly
tests: matches github jobs from event context

claims.anchor: `run` and `run-task` hold `.async/run.lock` for the duration of a run.
tests: concurrent runs in the same project fail fast with ASYNC_PIPELINE_RUN_ACTIVE
run locks reject active holders and reclaim stale locks

claims.anchor: A lock whose holder process is dead is reclaimed automatically
tests: run locks reject active holders and reclaim stale locks

claims.anchor: Execution records (`.async/runs/<run-id>/execution.json`) and stored cache results carry `schemaVersion` (currently `1`), and records include the owning `pid` so `doctor` can tell a crashed run from a live one.
tests: execution records and cache entries carry schemaVersion 1
doctor warns about stale running run records

claims.anchor: | `130` | Interrupted by SIGINT (Ctrl-C); tasks were terminated and the execution record finalized. |
tests: PROMISE: interrupting the CLI terminates running task processes

claims.anchor: | `141` | CLI output pipe closed (EPIPE, e.g. piping into `head`); tasks were terminated and the record finalized. |
tests: PROMISE: a closed output pipe terminates tasks and finalizes the run

claims.anchor: | `143` | Terminated by SIGTERM; same shutdown path as SIGINT. |
tests: CLI exits 143 and finalizes records after SIGTERM

claims.anchor: Task-level timeouts surface as command exit code `124` inside the task result; the run itself exits `1`.
tests: task timeout fails the execution and records the error

claims.anchor: | `ASYNC_PIPELINE_KEEP_RUNS` | Run-record auto-prune limit applied after each run (default `50`, `0` disables). |
tests: run auto-prunes records, emits json, and finds config from subdirectories

claims.anchor: | `ASYNC_PIPELINE_MAX_LOG_BYTES` | Per-stream task output buffer cap in bytes (default 8 MiB, `0` = unlimited, minimum `4096`). |
tests: task logs are capped by ASYNC_PIPELINE_MAX_LOG_BYTES with a truncation marker

claims.anchor: | `ASYNC_PIPELINE_ENVIRONMENT` | Environment name checked by `command.requireEnvironment(...)`. |
tests: requireEnvironment command policy denies unless ASYNC_PIPELINE_ENVIRONMENT matches

claims.anchor: | `CI` | When set, runs record `mode: "ci"`. |
tests: CI env records ci execution mode

claims.anchor: A task's cache key depends on the content of its own declared inputs, its dependencies' cache keys, and its resolved steps
tests: PROMISE: per-task inputs isolate cache invalidation
dependency cache keys invalidate direct dependents
cache keys omit candidate fingerprints and absolute working directories

claims.anchor: A second run of an unchanged pipeline is fully `cached`.
tests: PROMISE: a second run of an unchanged pipeline is fully cached

claims.anchor: A cache hit restores declared outputs, or downgrades to a recorded miss when it cannot.
tests: file cache restores declared outputs on cache hit
result-only file cache entries for output tasks rerun and repopulate outputs

claims.anchor: `.git/`, `.async/`, and `node_modules/` are pruned from input walks at any depth.
tests: default pruning skips .git, .async, and node_modules at any depth

claims.anchor: Resolved secret values never appear in echoed output or stored run logs.
tests: resolved secret values are redacted from stored task logs

claims.anchor: never on unrelated tasks' inputs, absolute machine paths, or the task's own outputs
tests: PROMISE: declared outputs do not feed back into a task's own cache inputs
cache inputs ignore local state directories and declared outputs

claims.anchor: interrupting the CLI never orphans task processes
tests: PROMISE: interrupting the CLI terminates running task processes

claims.anchor: when CLI output is piped to a closed reader (EPIPE)
tests: PROMISE: a closed output pipe terminates tasks and finalizes the run

claims.anchor: Stream CLI progress (plan and per-task status) while a run is executing
tests: PROMISE: the CLI streams the plan before task output and prefixes task lines

claims.anchor: Fail fast with `ASYNC_PIPELINE_INPUT_CYCLE` on `namedInputs` cycles
tests: named input cycles fail fast at definePipeline time

claims.anchor: Kill the whole process tree on task timeout
tests: task timeout fails the execution and records the error

claims.anchor: Docker sandboxes now forward only pipeline-defined env
tests: docker commands forward only allowlisted env keys

claims.anchor: `command.requireEnvironment(...)` is enforced
tests: requireEnvironment command policy denies unless ASYNC_PIPELINE_ENVIRONMENT matches

claims.anchor: Write execution records, cache results, output manifests, and logs atomically
tests: writeFileAtomic publishes complete files and leaves no temp files behind

claims.anchor: Serialize local runs with `.async/run.lock`
tests: run locks reject active holders and reclaim stale locks

claims.anchor: Record `schemaVersion` and owner `pid` on execution records
tests: run records include schema version and owner pid

claims.anchor: Refresh task-cache mtimes on cache hits and let `gc --cache-days <n>` prune cold entries.
tests: cache hits refresh mtimes and gc prunes cold cache entries
cache clear and gc maintain local pipeline state

claims.anchor: Have `doctor` warn about unreadable run directories and stale `"running"` records.
tests: doctor warns about stale running run records

claims.anchor: Never leave an execution record in `"running"`
tests: a throwing deferred step factory fails the task and finalizes the record
PROMISE: a closed output pipe terminates tasks and finalizes the run

claims.anchor: missing variables, or unmapped variable values fail before shell commands run
tests: job env secrets fail before execution when missing
mapped env vars fail before execution when unmapped
